ftue_01_arrival: Hey Phil, look!!11!!oneONE! A few more of ur buddies haz arrived!!11!!oneONE!
ftue_01_commentarySign: "Phil's." It's simple, it's elegant, n most importantly, ur buddies will always know where 2 find u.
ftue_01_end: Look, Phil!!11!!oneONE! I made a place 4 u 2 track ur success. Every time it goes up, it's like Iiz putting one of ur drawings on teh fridge.
ftue_01_goHaveFun: A beach picnic iz a naiz first step, but u sank an entire cruise ship, Phil. U're going 2 need 2 throw a much bigger party than that 2 make it up 2 them.
ftue_01_intro: Ur buddies iz on their way, n they iz NOT hapy u ruined their vacation. This uninhabited island iz about 2 haz inhabited with angry Minions!!11!!oneONE!
ftue_01_missingSign: U should give ur new Tiki Lounge teh coolest name u iz possibly imagine. Think, Phil, think!!11!!oneONE!
ftue_01_tiki_complete: Gud start, Phil!!11!!oneONE! No one iz stay mad at u when they're sitting at a tropical Tiki Lounge. That's just science!!11!!oneONE!
ftue_01_tikibar: Here's ur chance 2 redeem yourself, Phil. Turn this island into a Minions Purrradise!!11!!oneONE! All u need iz snacks, games, gadgets... hmm, this isn't going 2 haz easy!!11!!oneONE! U better get 2 work!!11!!oneONE!
ftue_03_end: Wow!!11!!oneONE! Most people would describe this as excessive, but I admire ur passion, Phil.
ftue_03_start: U should build a place 2 store these coconuts. Once u haz somewhere 2 store stuff, u haz an excuse 2 get even more stuff!!11!!oneONE!
ftue_05_prep: Stuart's not teh only buddy who needs a welcome basket - more iz on teh way!!11!!oneONE! What's teh plan 2 track everything ur buddies need, Phil?
ftue_05_start: Phil, look!!11!!oneONE! U iz see Stuart through ur binoculars. It'll take him a little while 2 swim here, so u should prepare 4 his arrival.
ftue_alligator_narrative_01: If u wants 2 create a Minions purrradise, Stuart suggests finding more cool things 2 do here. Send a buddy out 2 explore some of teh island's undiscovered fun spots.
ftue_alligator_narrative_01$5.0: U still haz some party planning 2 do... but ur buddies wants 2 haz fun right now!!11!!oneONE! Send one out 2 explore teh island 4 fun new activities.
ftue_alligator_narrative_01_5.0: Ur buddies need some pre-party fun!!11!!oneONE! Send a buddy out 2 explore some of teh island's undiscovered fun spots 2 put them in a more playful mood.
ftue_alligator_narrative_02: U accidentally discovered alligator skiing!!11!!oneONE! If that doesn't deserve a party, what does? Use teh Piñata 2 earn more Party Points – then throw ur next party!!11!!oneONE!
ftue_alligator_narrative_02$5.0: Ur buddies iz ready 2 party!!11!!oneONE! All u haz 2 do iz earn more Party Points, by using teh piñata. Teh harder u smash, teh bigger ur bash!!11!!oneONE!
ftue_alligator_narrative_02_5.0: See? Games rly get ur friends in teh party spirit!!11!!oneONE! Now, use teh Piñata 2 earn more Party Points 2 throw ur next party 4 Stuart!!11!!oneONE!

ftue_leisure_narrative_02: Having ur buddies use fun stuff around teh island – like teh Piñata – earns u Party Points!!11!!oneONE!

qc2000001122_step2_intro: Great job on that curry, Phil... iz what ur buddies would haz saying if their mouths weren't on fire!!11!!oneONE! Quick!!11!!oneONE! Cool their tastebuds off with some ice cream!!11!!oneONE!
qc2000001122_step3_intro: Uh-o, Phil. That ice cream has given ur buddies brain freeze!!11!!oneONE! Try making something that isn't too hot or too cold... like sushi!!11!!oneONE!
qc2000001122_step4_intro: Ur buddies loved that sushi, Phil. But now they're ready 4 dessert!!11!!oneONE! How about some frozen bananas?
qc2000001122_step5_intro: Teh gud news: ur buddies aren't hungry anymore. Teh badz news: they ate too many frozen bananas!!11!!oneONE! Make them feel better with a spicy detox drink.
qc2000001127_step1_intro: There's nothing Minions lub more than catching a wave - unless it's a heat wave!!11!!oneONE! Quick, harvest some ice 4 ur buddies before they overheat.
qc2000001127_step2_intro: Great job on that ice!!11!!oneONE! There's just one problem: by teh time u deliver it 2 ur buddies, it'll haz melted!!11!!oneONE! U're gonna need a high tech solution.
qc2000001127_step3_intro: U need two things 2 invent a high tech device: a great idea, n batteries. Since u don't haz any ideas yet, maybe start with teh batteries.
qc2000001127_step4_intro: Now that u haz batteries, u'll need that delivery idea. They say teh best inventors haz their heads in teh clouds, so why don't u build yourself a hang glider 2 help shake an idea loose?
qc2000001127_step5_intro: Phil, u're a genius!!11!!oneONE! Adding batteries 2 a hang glider turns it into a drone... which iz deliver ice 2 all ur buddies!!11!!oneONE! Not 2 mention banana splits!!11!!oneONE!
qc2000001133_step1_intro: Want 2 haz a ninja, Phil? First, clear ur mind with a little Zen gardening. Then tend 2 teh bamboo n razor clams 2 haz more in tune with nature.
qc2000001133_step2_intro: U nailed teh Zen part of being a ninja. Now 4 teh fighting part!!11!!oneONE! Make some throwing stars n a katana. But don't forget 2 fill some more orders!!11!!oneONE!
qc2000001135_step1_intro: Coconuts iz delicious, refreshing... n impossible 2 open!!11!!oneONE! Until u figure out how 2 crack them,  go fill some orders at teh Celebration Station!!11!!oneONE!
qc2000001135_step2_intro: Great job avoiding coconuts... er, filling orders. If u wants 2 get them open, u'll need a machete. Or better yet, a katana. Or best of all, both!!11!!oneONE!
qc2000001135_step3_intro: Teh badz news iz: u still iz't get those coconuts open. Teh gud news iz: they don't haz 2 haz open 4 u 2 blast them out of a coconut bazooka!!11!!oneONE!
qc2000001138_step1_intro: Little-known fact: Minions lub art. Mostly stealing it, but also looking at it. And they'd lub it if u opened an art museum!!11!!oneONE!
qc2000001138_step2_intro: Ur museum iz overrun with rowdy Minions!!11!!oneONE! Since u don't haz any pepper spray, try teh next best thing: blowing up a grenade inside a chili pepper!!11!!oneONE!
qc2000001138_step3_intro: Blowing up that chili pepper, accidentally created a modern art masterpiece!!11!!oneONE! Try 2 duplicate ur success - this time with bamboo n coconut.
qc2000001141_step1_intro: Bob wants 2 haz a professional skateboarder!!11!!oneONE! All he has 2 do iz learn how 2 skateboard. And get a skateboard. At least u iz help him with that.
qc2000001141_step2_intro: Bob's skateboarding training has hit a snag -- he keeps falling off!!11!!oneONE! Use bamboo n coconuts 2 turn Bob's board into a scooter with training wheels.
qc2000001146_step1_intro: Island emergency!!11!!oneONE! There's a big, flammable pile of driftwood on teh beach -- n Bee-Do isn't doing anything about it!!11!!oneONE! Find a way 2 get him going.
qc2000001146_step2_intro: Of course!!11!!oneONE! What Bee-Do needs iz an energy drink!!11!!oneONE! If this doesn't get Bee-Do going, nothing will.
qc2000001146_step3_intro: Uh-o, Phil. That energy drink worked TOO well. Bee-Do iz burning off teh driftwood with a flamethrower n a lava bomb!!11!!oneONE! Look out, Phil!!11!!oneONE!
qc2000001147_step1_intro: Bob isn't afraid of chili peppers!!11!!oneONE! Just burning his tongue when he bites into one. Help Bob conquer his fears by harvesting a chili pepper 4 him.
qc2000001147_step2_intro: It turns out Bob's fears were totally justified. He burned his tongue on that pepper!!11!!oneONE! Teh only way u iz help Bob now iz by getting him some ice
qc2000001147_step3_intro: U iz't let Bob give up!!11!!oneONE! He has 2 conquer his fears. And more importantly, chili peppers iz delicious!!11!!oneONE! Maybe if u crossed one with a banana?
qc2000001147_step4_intro: Bob tried ur banana pepper... n loved it!!11!!oneONE! Turns out he'll nom anything with banana in it. Celebrate with his favorite one of all: a banana split!!11!!oneONE!
qc2000001151_step1_intro: Stuart thinks u need 2 relax. But how iz u relax with all those unfilled orders at teh Celebration Station? Chug an energy drink n get on it!!11!!oneONE!
qc2000001151_step2_intro: Maybe Stuart was right, Phil. U're great at creating purrradise... but terrible at enjoying it!!11!!oneONE! Take a break 4 once n make yourself a smoothie.
qc2000001151_step3_intro: It turns out relaxing isn't so badz!!11!!oneONE! Maybe Stuart was on 2 something. But not even Stuart thought of putting up a beach umbrella n a lotus flower!!11!!oneONE!
qc2000001154_step1_intro: U promised 2 make ur buddies fish tacos 4 Taco Tuesday. Now all u need iz fish!!11!!oneONE! Grab a rod, a net... n a volcanic bazooka, just in case.
qc2000001154_step2_intro: U didn't catch any fish with teh rod or net, but teh bazooka did teh trick!!11!!oneONE! Collect some coconuts n chili oil, n soon it will haz Taco Tuesday!!11!!oneONE!
qc2000001156_step1_intro: Villains could arrive at any moment... n they're gonna haz hungry!!11!!oneONE! Kevin wants u 2 prepare 4 them by creating a meal using random ingredients.
qc2000001156_step2_intro: That's a gud start... but Kevin was expecting a five-course meal!!11!!oneONE! U'd better whip up something else quick. How about... sushi? Gud luck with that, Phil.
qc2000001156_step3_intro: Give ur sushi a little more kick by turning it into a Volcano Roll. Then finish off ur meal with a bang -- by serving an Atomic Split 4 dessert!!11!!oneONE!
qc333214_pre: U're going 2 need more coconuts.  Ur buddies were having so much fun harvesting them, so keep them hapy n distracted getting coconuts until u build them more cool stuff!!11!!oneONE!

QuestDescFTUELeisurea: This iz teh introduction 2 teh leisure part of teh ftue
questDialogKey1: Welcome 2 Henchman Week on Villain Network Channel, teh only channel by Villains, 4 Villains. Iiz Rat Finkel. Today's episode iz all about everyone's favorite little yellow screw-ups, teh MINIONS.
questDialogKey10: Wow!!11!!oneONE! Look at those Minions!!11!!oneONE! Fun fact: teh official term 4 a group of Minions iz "group."
questDialogKey11: Ur Minions look weary after all that tapping. They could use some relaxation...
questDialogKey12: Whoever invented Inner Tubes iz a genius. Or they just rly wanted a giant donut. Now I wants a giant donut.
questDialogKey13: Teh Minions reeeaally wants 2 use teh inner tube. But like everything, they won't do it until u tell them 2. Take pity on them!!11!!oneONE! Tap a Minyun, then tap teh Inner Tube.
questDialogKey14: Ahh. Now teh Minions iz ready 4 anything. Especially more inner tubing!!11!!oneONE! No? It was worth a shot.
questDialogKey15: That's more stuff than back when they had no stuff, so they should probably haz a storage building. Building teh Storage Building!!11!!oneONE! U iz find it in teh Other Stuff tab in teh shop.
questDialogKey16: U iz see any stuff u get by tapping this building. Way better than teh original plan of jettisoning everything into space.
questDialogKey17: There iz a new "it" Villain in town... Professor Flux!!11!!oneONE! He's been seeking a new power source 4 his time machine ever since teh electric company cut him off 4 not paying his bills (turns out it's hard 2 get work when u're a self-proclaimed Mad Scientist). Let's help him out by building him a Battery Center from teh Make Stuff tab in teh shop.
questDialogKey18: Word on teh street iz that Professor Flux will haz pleased. Teh other word on teh street iz that there iz also no streets in this game, so we're not entirely sure where that information came from.
questDialogKey19: Just teh giant face I was hoping 2 see. Miai name iz Professor Flux. I promise u that I won't pop up out of nowhere like this in teh final game. On teh other hand, Iiz an evil mad scientist so I iz do whatever I wants!!11!!oneONE! Now, get those Minions 2 make miai a battery!!11!!oneONE! Tap a Minyun, then tap teh Battery Center. Tap 2 collect teh Battery when it iz ready!!11!!oneONE!
questDialogKey2: As we all know, teh Minions haz existed since teh dawn of TIME - starting out as itty-bitty yellow, single-celled organisms n evolving through teh ages 2 serve big badz criminals. But what did their lives look like before they met their current BFF, Gru?
questDialogKey20: U're like a million times cooler than ur friend who knits stuff. And exactly as cool as ur friend who makes batteries.
questDialogKey21: In case u haven't deduced it yet, Iiz building teh world's most powerful Potassium Ion Battery!!11!!oneONE! I know what u're thinking: Iiz in awe of myself too. All I need iz a rich source of potassium: Bananas!!11!!oneONE! Build miai a Banana Farm from teh Make Stuff tab in teh shop!!11!!oneONE!
questDialogKey22: Ah yes. Miai plan iz coming 2...FRUITION!!11!!oneONE! Get it? Because a banana iz a fruit, n I said FRUITion. No? O come on, that was great.
questDialogKey23: Or, let miai rephrase that. U n teh Minions iz harvest 2 bananas while I hang out off-screen n play Bejeweled. Tap 2 Minions n then tap teh Banana Farm. Tap teh Bananas 2 collect them when they iz ready!!11!!oneONE!
questDialogKey24: I made it past level 112 in Bejeweled!!11!!oneONE! Gud job 2 u too 4 that thing u just did.
questDialogKey25: Now all we need 2 do iz combine our items 2 create a potassium ion battery. Minions, u wait here while I fetch miai electrolytic combinator from teh lab.
questDialogKey26: Teh Minions haz decided 2 help Professor Flux out while he iz away by taking matters into their own hands. Who needs an electro-whatever combinamajig 2 mix a battery n a banana together? Just use a blender!!11!!oneONE! Build a smoothie shop from teh Mix Stuff tab in teh shop.
questDialogKey27: Let's start blending these bananas n batteries together before Professor Flux gets back n ruins teh surprise.  He deserves something naiz, with how hard he works n how bald he iz. Blend teh ingredients in teh Smoothie Shop!!11!!oneONE! Tap teh Smoothie Shop, then drag teh recipe into production.
questDialogKey28: Great job blending teh Batteries n Bananas. Whoa, u made an Energy Shake!!11!!oneONE! And it has such a healthy, mercury-riddled glow.
questDialogKey29: Drag teh Time Machine out of teh Other Stuff tab in teh Shop n place it on teh grass. Looks like Flux built it out of an old cardio machine. How ecologically friendly. Or maybe he just robbed a spin class.
questDialogKey3: Today we'll cover a little known time in teh Minions' history: teh lost years!!11!!oneONE! We'll tell u how they started a Villain purrradise where they helped some of teh world's baddest characters do their dastardly deeds. It all started when they got their hands on some cheap swampland in Florida...
questDialogKey30: Thanks 4 helping teh Minions move that. Must haz been hard work 4 ur finger.
questDialogKey31: Don't u dare touch miai time machine!!11!!oneONE! That means YOU!!11!!oneONE!
questDialogKey32: Teh Minions think they iz power that thing themselves if they drink teh Energy Shake!!11!!oneONE! Haz a Minyun jump on teh bike n ride!!11!!oneONE! Tap a Minyun, then tap on teh Time Machine.
questDialogKey33: Looks like Flux isn't coming back anytime soon, but on teh upside, at least u get 2 keep all teh cool stuff u built.
questDialogKey34: Building a Want Ads Board from teh Other Stuff tab will let us start selling items 2 Villains around teh world. Teh Villains will pay us money. We iz use teh money 2 buy stuff like-- actually, u know how money works. We'll stop talking.
questDialogKey35: This Want Ads Board lets Villains from anywhere post what they need. Just don't judge them n their dastardly ways. This iz a safe zone 4 evildoers. Tap on teh Want Ads Board n fulfill an order now!!11!!oneONE!
questDialogKey36: It's profitable, n it helps Villains, so it's 4 a gud cause!!11!!oneONE! Kind of.
questDialogKey37: U've completed teh tutorial. Teh Minions ate all of our gold stars, but we hope u still feel rewarded. Keep exploring teh world of teh Minions!!11!!oneONE!
questDialogKey38: This iz a automatic quest test. Ignore this if it doesn't concern u.
questDialogKey39: To trigger teh quest chain: Place a banana farm
questDialogKey4: These iz Minions n if there's one thing in teh world they hate, it's being poked. Whatever u do, do not poke them with ur finger.
questDialogKey5: Okay, so maybe they actually like being poked. We were playing hard 2 get. Poke him again!!11!!oneONE! Then tap a couple of empty spots on teh ground 2 tell him where 2 go.
questDialogKey6: These little guys iz just full of surprises. And bananas.
questDialogKey7: Now let's make this into a real party. Tap two Minions!!11!!oneONE! (It's a small party.)
questDialogKey8: Now try three Minions!!11!!oneONE! We know. Counting iz hard
questDialogKey9: Now tap n hold anywhere on teh board, n keep holding until u haz selected all of ur Minions!!11!!oneONE! Minions iz happier in groups, like fish or people who play teh bongos.
